privileged_info_summary: This is a completely synthetic task with no real privileged information. All data is fictional and created for the automated testing environment. Products (WBH-001: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones at $79.99, USBC-065: USB-C Laptop Charger at $34.99) are created by setup_woocommerce.sh. Customer data (Sarah Mitchell, 456 Oak Avenue, Portland OR 97201, sarah.mitchell@email.com, 503-555-0147) is fabricated for the task. Expected order total of $149.97 (1×$79.99 + 2×$34.99) falls within the specified range of $145.00–$155.00. Payment method is Cash on Delivery; order status should be 'wc-processing'.
